lucky to catch this beautiful mahseer after a hard day of fishing. i'm simply humbled by the power of this fish everytime i go after them. lure: zman swimmerz 6inch with a 28 gm mustad darter jig head. bluefin mahseer on soft plastic lure - india 2022
https://youtu.be/ieghrkidgd8

it is encouraging to see these young humpback mahseer recruits show up now and again in the protected waters of the #coorgwildlifesociety. 
#humpbackmahseer #savemahseer #nammatigerofthecauvery #nammamahseer #wildlifeassociationofsouthindia #cauveryriver #cauverywildlifesanctuary #fisheries #fisheri

deccan mahseer (tor khudree) from india. possibly western ghats. i've been searching for these for a long time & finally i've imported them myself.

#tor #torkhudree #deccanmahseer #mahseer #indianfish #fish #freshwaterfish #cyprinidae #ikan #kelah #malaysia #aquariumfish #fishtank #fishphotography

topwater mahseer

my first fish on the production benthic plop plop at kaveri river karnataka

crazy lure got this amazing beauty on my 3rd cast the top water take is brilliant .

caught on pelagic nomad rod, shimano curadok reel and benthic plop plop lure

#shimanofishing #shimano #shimanocuradok #

sad news that the humpback mahseer is now an endangered species. it can now only be found in a few places in southern india - including parts of the cauvery river where i caught this 44lb specimen more than 15 years ago! good to see that the mahseer trust are trying to save them #mahseer #mahseertru

tbt november 2005 on the cauvery river in india and my first ever big mahseer. this one weighed 44lb and had to follow it through some rapids in a coracle! such a shame the fishing has now been banned on the whole of this stretch. #bheemeshwari #cauveryriver #mahseer #india #fishing #fishinginindia
